common.deleteItemConfirmDescription: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mian leat an mhír seo a scriosadh?

errors.unknownErrorTryAgain: Tharla earráid anaithnid. Déan iarracht arís.
errors.vaultTooLarge: Tá an cruinneachán rómhór don fhreastalaí le glacadh leis. Bain triail as roinnt míreanna nó ceangaltán a bhaint chun an méid a laghdú agus déan iarracht arís.
errors.serverVersionTooOld: Ní mór an freastalaí AliasVault a nuashonrú go leagan níos nuaí chun an ghné seo a úsáid. Téigh i dteagmháil le riarthóir an fhreastalaí más gá duit cabhair.

auth.enterPassword: Cuir isteach do phasfhocal chun do chruinneachán a dhíghlasáil
auth.biometricPrompt: Ar mhaith leat {{biometric}} a úsáid chun do chruinneachán a dhíghlasáil?
auth.authCodeNote: Tabhair faoi deara: mura bhfuil rochtain agat ar do ghléas fíordheimhnitheora, is féidir leat do 2FA a athshocrú le cód aisghabhála trí logáil isteach tríd an suíomh Gréasáin.

errors.invalidAuthCode: Please enter a valid 6-digit authentication code
errors.serverError: Could not reach AliasVault server. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.
errors.serverErrorSelfHosted: Could not reach the API. For self-hosted instances, please verify the API endpoint is reachable by navigating to it in a browser: it should display 'OK'.
errors.networkError: Network request failed. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.networkErrorSelfHosted: Network request failed. Check your network connection and server availability. For self-hosted instances, please ensure you have a valid SSL certificate installed. Self-signed certificates are not supported on mobile devices for security reasons.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please login again.

auth.confirmLogout: Are you sure you want to logout? You need to login again with your master password to access your vault.

logout.unsyncedChangesWarning: You have unsynced changes that will be lost if you log out now. Are you sure you want to continue?

errors.vaultOutdated: Your vault is outdated. Please login on the AliasVault website and follow the steps.
errors.versionNotSupported: This version of the AliasVault mobile app is not supported by the server anymore. Please update your app to the latest version.
errors.serverVersionNotSupported: The AliasVault server needs to be updated to a newer version in order to use this mobile app. Please contact support if you need help.
errors.appOutdated: This app is outdated and cannot be used to access this (newer) vault version. Please update the AliasVault app to continue.
errors.passwordChanged: Your password has changed since the last time you logged in. Please login again for security reasons.
errors.passwordChangeRequiresOnline: Password change requires an internet connection. Please try again when online.

passkeys.helpText: Passkeys are created on the website when prompted. They cannot be manually edited. To remove this passkey, you can delete it from this credential.
passkeys.passkeyWillBeDeleted: This passkey will be deleted when you save this credential.

totp.instructions: Enter the secret key shown by the website where you want to add two-factor authentication.

errors.scanFailed: Failed to scan QR code. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings

iosAutofillSettings.headerText: Is féidir leat AliasVault a chumrú chun feidhmiúlacht uathlíonta pasfhocail agus eochracha pas dúchasacha a sholáthar in iOS. Lean na treoracha thíos chun é a chumasú.
iosAutofillSettings.passkeyNotice: Cruthaítear pasfhocail trí iOS. Chun iad a stóráil in AliasVault, cinntigh go bhfuil an Líonadh Uathoibríoch thíos cumasaithe.
iosAutofillSettings.howToEnable: Conas Líonadh Uathoibríoch & Eochracha Pas a chumasú:
iosAutofillSettings.step1: 1. Oscail Socruithe iOS tríd an gcnaipe thíos
iosAutofillSettings.step5: 5. Díchumasaigh soláthraithe pasfhocal eile (m.sh. "Pasfhocail iCloud") chun coimhlintí a sheachaint
iosAutofillSettings.alreadyConfigured: Tá sé cumraithe agam cheana féin

androidAutofillSettings.warningDescription: Tá tacaíocht uathlíonta agus eochairfhocail le haghaidh Android i riocht turgnamhach faoi láthair.
androidAutofillSettings.headerText: Is féidir leat AliasVault a chumrú chun feidhmiúlacht uathlíonta pasfhocail agus eochracha pas dúchasacha a sholáthar in Android. Lean na treoracha thíos chun é a chumasú.
androidAutofillSettings.passkeyNotice: Cruthaítear pasfhocail trí Bhainisteoir Dintiúirí Android (Android 14+). Chun iad a stóráil in AliasVault, cinntigh go bhfuil an Líonadh Uathoibríoch thíos cumasaithe.
androidAutofillSettings.howToEnable: Conas Líonadh Uathoibríoch & Eochracha Pas a chumasú:
androidAutofillSettings.step1: 1. Oscail Socruithe Android tríd an gcnaipe thíos, agus athraigh an "seirbhís uathlíonta is fearr leat" go "AliasVault"
androidAutofillSettings.buttonTip: Mura n-oibríonn an cnaipe thuas, b'fhéidir go bhfuil sé blocáilte mar gheall ar shocruithe slándála. Is féidir leat dul de láimh chuig Socruithe Android → Bainistíocht Ghinearálta → Pasfhocail agus uathlíonadh.
androidAutofillSettings.step2: 2. D’fhéadfadh sé go mbeadh gá le cumraíocht láimhe sna socruithe i gcás roinnt aipeanna, m.sh. Google Chrome, chun ligean d’aipeanna uathlíonta tríú páirtí. Mar sin féin, ba cheart go n-oibreodh formhór na n-aipeanna le huathlíonadh de réir réamhshocraithe.
androidAutofillSettings.alreadyConfigured: Tá sé cumraithe agam cheana féin
androidAutofillSettings.showSearchTextDescription: Cuir an téacs a fhaigheann AliasVault ó Android san áireamh a úsáideann sé chun dintiúir chomhoiriúnacha a chuardach

settings.copyTotpOnFillDescription: Nuair a líonann tú dintiúir go huathoibríoch le 2FA, cóipeáiltear a chód TOTP go huathoibríoch chuig an ghearrthaisce ionas gur féidir leat é a ghreamú sa chéad réimse eile.
settings.clipboardClearDescription: Glan pasfhocail chóipeáilte agus faisnéis íogair go huathoibríoch ó do ghearrthaisce tar éis tréimhse ama shonraithe.
settings.clipboardClearAndroidWarning: Tabhair faoi deara: tá stair na gearrthaisce cumasaithe ar roinnt gléasanna Android, rud a d'fhéadfadh súil a choinneáil ar mhíreanna a cóipeáladh roimhe seo, fiú tar éis do AliasVault an gearrthaisce a ghlanadh. Ní féidir le AliasVault ach an mhír is déanaí a athscríobh, ach d'fhéadfadh iontrálacha níos sine fanacht le feiceáil sa stair. Ar chúiseanna slándála, molaimid aon ghnéithe staire gearrthaisce a dhíchumasú i socruithe do ghléis.
settings.clipboardLocalOnlyDescription: Coinnigh dintiúir chóipeáilte ar an ngléas seo in ionad iad a shioncronú le do ghléasanna Apple eile tríd an Ghearrthaisce Uilíoch.
settings.clipboardLocalOnlyDisabledWarning: Agus é seo múchta, is féidir dintiúir chóipeáilte a shioncronú le do ghléasanna Apple eile (Mac, iPad, srl.) tríd an Ghearrthaisce Uilíoch.
settings.batteryOptimizationActive: Tá optamú ceallraí ag cur bac ar thascanna cúlra
settings.batteryOptimizationHelpDescription: Cuireann optamú ceallraí Android cosc ​​ar ghlanadh iontaofa an ghearrthaisce nuair a bhíonn an aip sa chúlra. Trí optamú ceallraí a dhíchumasú le haghaidh AliasVault, is féidir an ghearrthaisce cúlra a ghlanadh go beacht agus deonaítear na ceadanna aláraim riachtanacha go huathoibríoch.
settings.importSectionDescription: Iompórtáil do phasfhocail ó bhainisteoirí pasfhocal eile nó ó easpórtáil AliasVault roimhe seo.
settings.importWebNote: To import credentials from existing password managers, please login to the web app. The import feature is currently only available on the web version.
settings.exportSectionDescription: Export your vault data to a CSV file. This file can be used as a back-up and can also be imported into other password managers.
settings.exportWarning:
Warning: Exporting your vault to an unencrypted file will expose all of your passwords and sensitive information in plain text. Only do this on trusted devices and ensure you:

• Store the exported file in a secure location
• Delete the file when you no longer need it
• Never share the exported file with others

Are you sure you want to continue with the export?

passwordConfirm.exportDescription: For security reasons, please enter your master password to confirm this export.

settings.languageSystemMessage: To change the app language, configure the preferred language for AliasVault in your device settings.

vaultUnlockSettings.description: Choose how you want to unlock your vault.
vaultUnlockSettings.biometricDisabledMessage: {{biometric}} is disabled for AliasVault. In order to use it, please enable it in your device settings first.
vaultUnlockSettings.biometricHelp: Use biometrics to unlock your vault, which is secured by the {{keystore}}.
vaultUnlockSettings.biometricUnavailableHelp: {{biometric}} is not available. Tap to open settings and/or go to your device settings to enable and configure it.
vaultUnlockSettings.featureRequiresPasscode: This feature requires a passcode to be enabled on your device.
vaultUnlockSettings.pinDescription: Use a custom PIN code to unlock your vault more quickly.
vaultUnlockSettings.passwordHelp: Re-enter your full master password to unlock your vault. This is always enabled as fallback option.

autoLockSettings.description: Choose how long the app can stay in the background before requiring re-authentication. You'll need to use Face ID or enter your password to unlock the vault again.

identityGeneratorSettings.description: Configure the default language and gender preference for generating new identities.
identityGeneratorSettings.languageDescription: Set the language that will be used when generating new identities.
identityGeneratorSettings.genderDescription: Set the gender preference for generating new identities.
identityGeneratorSettings.ageRangeDescription: Socraigh an raon aoise chun céannachtaí nua a ghiniúint.

passwordGeneratorSettings.description: Cumraigh na socruithe réamhshocraithe a úsáidtear agus pasfhocail nua á nginiúint. Úsáidfear na socruithe seo do gach pasfhocal nua mura ndéantar iad a shárú le haghaidh iontrálacha sonracha.

securitySettings.title: Slándáil
securitySettings.description: Bainistigh do shocruithe slándála chuntais agus cruinneacháin.

changePassword.headerText: Athraíonn athrú do phasfhocal máistir eochracha criptithe an tseomra cruinneacháin freisin. Moltar duit do phasfhocal máistir a athrú go tréimhsiúil chun do sheomraí cruinneacháin a choinneáil slán.
changePassword.enterCurrentPassword: Cuir isteach an focal faire reatha
changePassword.fillAllFields: Líon isteach na réimsí uile le do thoil
changePassword.currentPasswordIncorrect: Níl an focal faire reatha ceart
changePassword.passwordChangedSuccessfully: Athraíodh an focal faire go rathúil
changePassword.failedToChange: Theip ar an bpasfhocal a athrú. Déan iarracht arís.

activeSessions.headerText: Seo thíos liosta de na gléasanna ina bhfuil do chuntas logáilte isteach faoi láthair nó ina bhfuil seisiún gníomhach. Is féidir leat logáil amach ó aon cheann de na seisiúin seo anseo.
activeSessions.revokeConfirmation: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mian leat an seisiún seo a chúlghairm? Logálfaidh sé seo amach as an ngléas roghnaithe thú.
activeSessions.sessionRevoked: Seisiún curtha ar ceal go rathúil
activeSessions.failedToRevoke: Theip ar an seisiún a chúlghairm
activeSessions.failedToLoad: Theip ar na seisiúin ghníomhacha a lódáil

authLogs.headerText: Seo thíos forbhreathnú ar iarrachtaí logála isteach le déanaí i do chuntas.
authLogs.failedToLoad: Theip ar logaí údaraithe a lódáil

deleteAccount.headerText: Scriosfar do chuid sonraí go léir láithreach agus go buan má scriostar do chuntas.
deleteAccount.warningText: Rabhadh: Ní féidir an gníomh seo a chealú. Scriosfar do chuid sonraí go léir go buan.
deleteAccount.finalWarning: Rabhadh deiridh: Cuir isteach do phasfhocal chun do chuntas a scriosadh go buan.
deleteAccount.warningVaults: Scriosfar go buan na cruinneacháin chriptithe go léir ina bhfuil do chuid dintiúir go léir
deleteAccount.warningAliases: Beidh do leasainmneacha ríomhphoist dílleachtaí agus ní féidir le húsáideoirí eile iad a éileamh
deleteAccount.warningRecovery: Ní féidir do chuntas a aisghabháil tar éis scriosadh
deleteAccount.irreversibleWarning: Account deletion is irreversible and cannot be undone. Pressing the button below will delete your account immediately and permanently.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.failedToDelete: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

mobileLogin.confirmSubtitle: Re-authenticate to approve login on another device.
mobileLogin.confirmMessage: You are about to log in on a remote device with your account. This other device will have full access to your vault. Only proceed if you trust this device.
mobileLogin.successDescription: The remote device has been successfully logged in.
mobileLogin.requestExpired: This login request has expired. Please generate a new QR code.

items.title: Items
items.itemCreatedMessage: Your new item has been added to your vault and is ready to use.
items.name: Name
items.publicEmailDescription: Anonymous but limited privacy. Email content is readable by anyone that knows the address.
items.noMatchingItems: No items match the selected filter.
items.noItemsFound: No items found. Create one to get started. Tip: you can also login to the AliasVault web app to import credentials from other password managers.
items.allItemsInFolders: All your items are organized in folders. Tap a folder above to view your credentials, or use the search to find specific items.
items.offlineEmailsMessage: You are offline. Please connect to the internet to load your emails.
items.emailLoadError: An error occurred while loading emails. Please try again later.
items.emailUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while loading emails. Please try again later.
items.offlineMessage: You are offline. Please connect to the internet to sync your vault.
items.switchBackToOriginalApp: Switch back to the original app to continue.

autofillOpenApp.title: Autofill request
autofillOpenApp.description: Choose an action for the app or website that requested autofill.
autofillOpenApp.findExistingDescription: Select an existing credential from your vault to link to the address above.
autofillOpenApp.createNewDescription: Add a new credential to your vault for this app or URL.

autofillLinkExisting.title: Link to existing credential
autofillLinkExisting.intro: Select an existing credential from your vault to link to "{{target}}".
autofillLinkExisting.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to link "{{url}}" to this credential?

autofillUrlAdded.title: Credential linked
autofillUrlAdded.message: Autofill should now offer this credential the next time you open the app.

items.downloadToView: Download the file to view it

unsavedChanges.title: Discard Changes?
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

items.deleteHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this history record?
items.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

folders.deleteFolderKeepItemsDescription: Items will be moved to the parent folder.
folders.deleteFolderAndItemsDescription: {{count}} item(s) will be moved to Recently Deleted.
folders.emptyFolderHint: This folder is empty. To move items to this folder, edit the item and select this folder.

recentlyDeleted.title: Recently Deleted
recentlyDeleted.noItemsDescription: Items you delete will appear here for {{days}} days before being permanently removed.
recentlyDeleted.description: These items will be permanently deleted after {{days}} days. You can restore them or delete them immediately.
recentlyDeleted.confirmDeleteMessage: This item will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
recentlyDeleted.confirmEmptyAllMessage: All {{count}} items will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

emails.title: Emails
emails.subject: Subject:
emails.deleteEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this email? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
emails.offlineMessage: You are offline. Please connect to the internet to load your emails.
emails.emptyMessage: You have not received any emails at your private email addresses yet. When you receive a new email, it will appear here.

validation.invalidDateFormat: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format

apiErrors.CLAIM_DOES_NOT_MATCH_USER: The current chosen email address is already in use. Please change the email address by editing this credential.
apiErrors.CLAIM_DOES_NOT_EXIST: An error occurred while trying to load the emails. Please try to edit and save the credential entry to synchronize the database, then try again.
apiErrors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
apiErrors.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
apiErrors.ACCOUNT_BLOCKED: Your account has been disabled. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.
apiErrors.USER_NOT_FOUND: Invalid username or password. Please try again.
apiErrors.INVALID_AUTHENTICATOR_CODE: Invalid authenticator code. Please try again.
apiErrors.INVALID_RECOVERY_CODE: Invalid recovery code. Please try again.
apiErrors.PUBLIC_REGISTRATION_DISABLED: New account registration is currently disabled on this server. Please contact the administrator.
apiErrors.USERNAME_MISMATCH: Username does not match the current user.
apiErrors.PASSWORD_MISMATCH: The provided password does not match your current password.
apiErrors.USERNAME_EMPTY_OR_WHITESPACE: Username cannot be empty or whitespace.
apiErrors.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username too short: must be at least 3 characters long.
apiErrors.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username too long: cannot be longer than 40 characters.
apiErrors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARACTERS: Username is invalid, can only contain letters or digits.
apiErrors.VAULT_NOT_UP_TO_DATE: Your vault is not up-to-date. Please synchronize your vault and try again.
apiErrors.VAULT_ERROR: The local vault is not up-to-date. Please synchronize your vault by refreshing the page and try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: This page has been moved or deleted.

vaultError.title: Vault Error
vaultError.description: An error occurred while loading your vault. If this problem persists, please contact support.

loginSettings.title: API Connection
loginSettings.customProxyHeadersDescription: Add HTTP headers that will be sent with every request to your AliasVault server. Can be used for self-hosted setups behind a reverse proxy that checks for custom headers (e.g. Pangolin, Cloudflare Access).

upgrade.title: Upgrade Vault
upgrade.subtitle: AliasVault has updated and your vault needs to be upgraded. This should only take a few seconds.
upgrade.whatsNewDescription: An upgrade is required to support the following changes:
upgrade.noDescriptionAvailable: No description available for this version.

status.vaultAlreadyUpToDate: Vault is already up to date

alerts.unableToGetVersionInfo: Unable to get version information. Please try again.
alerts.selfHostedWarning: If you're using a self-hosted server, make sure to also update your self-hosted instance as otherwise logging in to the web client will stop working.
